title: BEL Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: BEL Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About BEL Ventures Solutions:
BEL Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL Ventures Solutions!
